However, the source map data is standard and points to typical source files.\n- No assumptions about vulnerabilities are made; the files are purely metadata/stubs.\n\n---\n\n### Final Recommendations:\n- **Malware Score:** Remain at 0 for all files.\n- **Obfuscated Score:** Remain at 0.\n- **Risk Score:** 0, as there is no evidence of security risk.\n\n---\n\n### My Overall Estimate:\n- **Malware:** 0 (no malicious activity detected)\n- **Obfuscated:** 0 (clear, standard autogenerated code)\n- **Risk:** 0 (no security risk)\n\n**Summary:** These files are standard autogenerated TypeScript declaration files with embedded source maps, serving as type definitions.
